subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: it [is] quite true that all the great Prophets - the Suns of God - are without sin: though the word 'prophet' is used in more senses than one by the Jews.
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @categories of Prophets (major; minor; village)
